def positive_concurrent_futures_executor_not_shut_down():
    rule_id = "concurrent_futures_executor_not_shut_down"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "ThreadPoolExecutor or ProcessPoolExecutor created without shutdown() or a context manager, leaking threads."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
